task:
/home/user/Documents/sphere_points.ply is an ASCII PLY with 1500 points sampled on a sphere centered near (3, 4, 5) with radius 2.0.

Fit a sphere primitive to the cloud (the fit yields a triangulated sphere mesh) and export only the fitted sphere entity as a PLY mesh at /home/user/Documents/fitted_sphere.ply. Do not export the original cloud. The output must be a mesh whose bounding box fits within [0.5, 1.5, 2.5]..[5.5, 6.5, 7.5] (approximately centered at (3, 4, 5) with diameter ~4) and whose X extent is at least 3.5.
